title: 100 Kroner (Famous Men and Women. Type 2; enhanced security features)

obverse.description:
Mainly identical with type 1, but more security features are added.
Red brown and black on orange background.
On the right side a portrait of famous composer Carl Nielsen, with a note and text ”Carl Nielsen" and 3 stylized snails.
Upper left a rhombe shaped hologram with notes, a "C (for hundred) and "100" can be seen depending on how the note is angeled. 
The numbers and signatures are printet with luminous colors. Furthermore the main motif from the reverse is printet with ultraviolet color and can only be seen in ultraviolet light.
obverse.lettering_translation:
Hundred Kroner
National Bank of Denmark

reverse.description:
On the left a basilisk inspired by a stone relief from Tømmerby Church in Thy. Behind which is a cross-shaped rosette in orange and gray.
On the right side an orange circle surrounding the watermark. In the orange circle is the serial specification. Inside the circle, a lot of smaller orange circles.
reverse.lettering:
100
HUNDREDE KRONER
SERIE 1997 UDSTEDT I HENHOLD TIL LOV OM DANMARKS NATIONALBANK ©
reverse.lettering_translation:
Hundred Kroner
Serie 1997, issued according to the law of the Nationalbank of Denmark ©

series: Kronesedlerne 8th issue - Famous men and women
comments:
Withdrawel:
Withdrawn since: 4th May 2010
 

Year:
Middle two digits of Serial-number give the printing year: D3082A Prefix D3, year (20)08.
 

Signatures:
The Left signature is one of the Govenors for Denmarks National Bank. The right signature is the Chief Cashier.
 

Difference from P#56:

- UV
Type 2 has a hologram with microprint and lumiscent colours. The obverse has an invisible print of the main motive on the reverse, only visible in UV light. The serial numbers, the signatures and the main colours of the obvers' motive.

watermark.description:
Portrait of Carl Nielsen.
Black hidden Security thread. 
Partly visible metallic security thread ”window thread ” with ”100 KR”
Micro print. On the Obverse is ”100 KR” printed around the watermark in micro print, and several other places, micro print are used in different sizes.
